title: Create Snyk ignore-rationale skill and pilot on 1 finding

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text:
Completed creation + one-finding pilot for local skill `snyk-code-ignore-rationale`.

Artifacts created:
- `~/.codex/skills/snyk-code-ignore-rationale/SKILL.md`
- `~/.codex/skills/snyk-code-ignore-rationale/references/ignore-template.md`
- `~/.codex/skills/snyk-code-ignore-rationale/scripts/extract_finding.py`
- `~/.codex/skills/snyk-code-ignore-rationale/agents/openai.yaml`

Validation:
- `quick_validate.py` => Skill is valid.
- Ran helper script on one real finding:
  - file `tools/ec2_bench_status.py`, line 10
  - finding id `983bb4bf-16a9-4225-9394-956896b825e8`
  - rule `python/CommandInjection`

Pilot decision outcome (for this one finding): dismiss as false positive with finding-specific rationale (non-shell subprocess list invocation in developer CLI context).
